title: John Swinney would 'consider' banning US military from Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: John Swinney would 'consider' banning US military from Prestwick Airport. John Swinney has said he would 'consider' banning US military aircraft from using Prestwick Airport if it was confirmed they were involved...
